mapper.select: SELECT ID, KAKAO_ID, KAKAO_NICKNAME, CAR_NAME, CAR_NUMBER, TO_CHAR(MAINTENANCE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MAINTENANCE_DATE, MILEAGE, MAINTENANCE_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, COST, SHOP_NAME, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM CAR_MAINTENANCE WHERE KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId} ORDER BY MAINTENANCE_DATE DESC, CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ID, KAKAO_ID, KAKAO_NICKNAME, CAR_NAME, CAR_NUMBER, TO_CHAR(MAINTENANCE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MAINTENANCE_DATE, MILEAGE, MAINTENANCE_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, COST, SHOP_NAME, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATED_AT FROM CAR_MAINTENANCE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAR_MAINTENANCE ( ID, KAKAO_ID, KAKAO_NICKNAME, CAR_NAME, CAR_NUMBER, MAINTENANCE_DATE, MILEAGE, MAINTENANCE_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, COST, SHOP_NAME, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( CAR_MAINTENANCE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{kakaoId}, #{kakaoNickname}, #{carName}, #{carNumber}, TO_DATE(#{maintenanceDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{mileage}, #{maintenanceType}, #{description}, #{cost}, #{shopName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CAR_MAINTENANCE SET CAR_NAME = #{carName}, CAR_NUMBER = #{carNumber}, MAINTENANCE_DATE = TO_DATE(#{maintenanceDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), MILEAGE = #{mileage}, MAINTENANCE_TYPE = #{maintenanceType}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, COST = #{cost}, SHOP_NAME = #{shopName}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}
